raw_description:
The 3-star Ibis Abu Dhabi Gate hotel is ideally located at the end of the creek between Abu Dhabi Gate City and Bain Al Jessrain in Rabdan area. Ibis Abu Dhabi Gate hotel is perfect for both business and leisure. ADNEC (Abu Dhabi National Exhibition Centre) and Abu Dhabi Airport are just 15 minutes away while Yas water world and Ferrari world are just 20 minutes away. Free high speed WiFi is provided in all public areas and rooms.

Featuring 252 individually decorated, modern, spacious and comfortable standard rooms and 42 one bedroom apartments with kitchen facilities. For entertainment each room is fitted with a flat-screen LCD TV with satellite channels.

Guests can enjoy an eclectic dining experience at Belgian Cafe, a modern yet traditional Italian journey in Gabbiano Italian Restaurant and 24 hour service in Fusion lounge. Wok & Co Restaurant serves an extensive quality breakfast buffet from 06:30am – 10:30am every day.

Access to the outdoor swimming pool on the 2nd floor with children’s pool, Sauna, Jacuzzi, Moroccan bath, Steam room and Spa is also available at the attached hotel for an additional fee.

Abu Dhabi International Airport is a 15 minutes’ drive from the property. Complimentary valet parking and self-parking is available on site.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.2for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Ibis Abu Dhabi Gate. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including Free WiFi, Free parking, Family rooms.
